calendar.matters:
Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Continued To Nov-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Russell Robinson for Bennie Wright (Creditor).

Mr. Ferdon stated that it is his understanding that the Court will not adjudicate the accounting and that he filed the amended petition to separate the petition for approval of the settlement. The Court expressed concern about distribution going to the Brother instead of Bennie Wright and raised the issue of notice of the amended petition. Mr. Ferdon acknowledged that the accounting shows distribution to the Brother and stated that they now have a judgment that will take that over. Mr. Ferdon will file notice of the amendment for 15-days. The Court will put the matter on calendar with no appearance required. The Petition for Settlement, etc. was continued to November 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Russell Robinson for Benny Wright (Creditor).

The Court stated that the examiner received an email from Mr. Ferdon stating that he is out of town and he is requesting a continuance to October 21, 2014. The Court further stated that this is a summary probate proceeding and it can only approve the settlement agreement that has been entered into but not the final distribution. The matter was continued to October 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Continued To Sep-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Jul-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Public Administrator Statement Of Property & Disposition; And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allow. Of Comp. & Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Continued To Jul-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Russell Robinson for Benny Wright (Creditor).

Mr. Ferdon addressed the issue of why the Court should entertain distribution by way of a petition when the Probate Code allows the Public Administrator to just file a statement and receipts, addressed the issue of notice to Dennis McCullough and stated that the reserve of $3,500.00 was being requested for tax purposes. The Petition for Settlement of Statement of Property and Disposition, etc. was continued to July 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to Dennis McCullough.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
